sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short title
The expenditure on the services of the Republic during the Appropriation
sections.text:
financial year which ended on 31 st December, 2011, of the monies
indicated in respect of the services in the third column of the
Schedule, being expenditure in excess of the monies appropriated
for the services by the Appropriation Act, 2011, and the
Supplementary Appropriation (201 l)Act, 2013, is hereby approved.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30/ 36, 1010/ Lusaka, Price K 1.00 each.
